prepareRenamePatterns.name: componentName
prepareRenamePatterns.description: Rename a React component declared as function or const (PascalCase)

prepareRenamePatterns.description: Rename a component props interface or type alias

prepareRenamePatterns.description: Rename a Zod form validation schema

prepareRenamePatterns.name: columnAccessorKey
prepareRenamePatterns.description: Rename a column accessor key in DataTable column definitions
